title: Verify trailer auto-play in Engagement section for un-started content
description: Test that if the user has acquired content but not started it, the trailer auto-plays in the Engagement section.
preconditions: User has added content to a watchlist but not played it

steps.description: 1. Add a movie to 'My List' but do not play it.
2. Navigate to the Trial Corner hub.

expected_result: The trailer for the acquired content should start playing automatically.
